TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-frog_Bajiaying

S.FORM: yakay kuini tangea vavalake si ka sauvalay.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小朋友是一個男生
There is a kid and he is a boy.

S.FORM: la e.
S.TRANSL: 然後
then

S.FORM: yakay ku lapulapu ini ku taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 他養了一隻狗
He kept a dog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la ikay ku takurauru si la ikay ki didilrungu.
S.TRANSL: 還有一隻青蛙在瓶內裏
and a frog is in the bottle.

S.FORM: la apece nga kuini vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩子就睡覺了
The kid slept.

S.FORM: si kuini takurauru yaie.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙呢?
That frog?

S.FORM: la tualay kuini ki taikayane ini kuini ki didilrungu la kela mulatadre.
S.TRANSL: 它從它住的那個瓶就跑出來
It escaped from the bottle where it lived.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la e.
S.TRANSL: 然後
then

S.FORM: muinu la iya.
S.TRANSL: 去那裡了呢?
Where did it go?

S.FORM: la kaynganay talepe.
S.TRANSL: 然後他就下來
Then he got down.

S.FORM: la dreele kuini kece ini lau muadringi.
S.TRANSL: 他就看他的鞋子(青蛙)可能進去
He checked his shoes and see if the frog is there.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kuini taupungu sa dreele kuini didilrungu kuini taikayane kuini ki takurauru muadringi.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗就看了那隻青蛙在瓶中所住的地方
The dog looked at the bottle where the frog lived.

S.FORM: sa muadringi kuini aulru ini la kai makapilipili nga.
S.TRANSL: 當它的頭去到裡面時就不能拉出來
When it stuck its head into (the bottle), it cannot pull it back.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ala.
S.TRANSL: 然後呢
then

S.FORM: la pai titituku si la mua ki lribange.
S.TRANSL: 一直在跳來跳去然後去窗戶
(it) kept jumping and then went to the window.

S.FORM: la ituku si la tuverevere si la kacuake nga kuini didilrungu.
S.TRANSL: 跳就滾下來, 然後那個瓶就破掉了
(it) jumped and rolled down, then the bottle was broken.

S.FORM: la kayngalay mulatradre kuini taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 然後這個狗就跑出來
Then the dog went out.

S.FORM: la kacuake nga kuini didilrungu.
S.TRANSL: 那個瓶就破掉了
The bottle was broken.

S.FORM: la malra ipipi kuini lasu kuini taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 然後這個男生就抱起那隻狗
Then the boy hug the dog.

S.FORM: la katuase ililuku taludrusa kuini ki taupungu ini.
S.TRANSL: 他就帶著他的狗出去外面
He brought his dog outside.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kudra latumu la ngipapapalay si la ikay ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 那些蜜蜂在樹上飛來飛去
Those bees are flying at the tree.

S.FORM: la patupapalra kuini ki tumu.
S.TRANSL: 就跟著那些蜜蜂
then (the boy) follows the bee

S.FORM: tupalra.
S.TRANSL: 跟隨
to follow

S.FORM: dredredrele si la dreele ikay kuini cekele kuini ki sigu.
S.TRANSL: 一直在看 然後就看到那個虎頭蜂
(the boy) is looking around and then sees that there is a nest of the hornets.

S.FORM: cekele.
S.TRANSL: 巢
nest

S.FORM: sigu.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂
hornet

S.FORM: kudra taupungu la ikay kuini si alealeale si sanamalramalra.
S.TRANSL: 狗一直正叫想要拿
the dog is barking and it wants to take (the nest)

S.FORM: kuini lasu yaiye la silasilape ku kuini takurauru ini.
S.TRANSL: 那個男的呢 他在找他的青蛙
The boy is finding his frog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la dreele kuini ki barungulu.
S.TRANSL: 然後看到那個洞
then (the boy) sees the hole

S.FORM: barugnulu.
S.TRANSL: 洞
hole

S.FORM: la lili si la kaynganay kuvaeva ku tila.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)偷看然後就一隻老鼠跑出來
then (the boy) peeps and then there comes a rat

S.FORM: kuini taupungu laikay kuini alealeale kuini ki sigu.
S.TRANSL: 因為了那些虎頭蜂，那隻狗一直叫
the dog is barking because of the paper wasp

S.FORM: ala malra pulebe kuini ki sigu la kaynganay silape.
S.TRANSL: 然後(男孩)把虎頭蜂拿下來，然後(蜜蜂)來尋找
Then (the boy) takes down the paper-wasp and then come (the bees) searching

S.FORM: la kela kuini la tumu ulebe.
S.TRANSL: 然後那些蜜蜂下來
then the bees comes down

S.FORM: sa mia kuini la dreele kudra angatu la ikay kudra barungulu.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)看到樹那邊有一個洞
(the boy) sees that there is a hole in the tree

S.FORM: kuini vavalake la katuase belenge dreele kuini ki barungulu.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩子離開上面看那個洞
the child, then,

S.FORM: sa dreele kuini ki barungunu la ngibuale kela tualay kuini ki barungulu kudra alaka kuici la ngituluku.
S.TRANSL: 他看到那個洞之後 就出現了一隻貓頭鷹
when (the boy) sees the hole, there comes an owl from the hole

S.FORM: sa dreele yaie la ngituluku si la tuverevere.
S.TRANSL: 當他看見(貓頭鷹)時，他嚇一跳 然後跌倒
When he sees the owl, he is astonished and then falls down.

S.FORM: ki kuini taupungu yaiye la mua kuini adethe ki sigu.
S.TRANSL: 狗就過去了 靠近虎頭蜂
the dog goes to the neighborhood of the paper wasp.

S.FORM: kainganai kulrikulri kuini sigu iniane.
S.TRANSL: 那個虎頭蜂就跑下來然後追他
The paper wasp comes and chases him.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la katuase laylaylay ubebere kuini la sigu.
S.TRANSL: 然後(男孩)一直跑著、逃跑 然後虎頭蜂
Then, (the boy) runs away and the paper wasp

S.FORM: kuini sigu kuini tumu la kurkuri si kuini ki taupngu.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂跟蜜蜂一直追著狗
The paper wasp and the bee chase the the dog

S.FORM: aduadua si ubebere.
S.TRANSL: (虎頭蜂)一面逃跑
(the paper wasp) runs away at the same time

S.FORM: la mialri kuini kuici.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹也是一樣
The owl is the same.

S.FORM: kuini vavaleke la dreele kuini talutukutuku la mubelenge.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩子然後就看到大石頭就爬上去
the child sees the bid rock and then climbs it

S.FORM: si la takusilasilape kuini ki taupungu ini.
S.TRANSL: 一面找他的狗
at the same time, (the child) is searching his dog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa kyaraishi kudra yaie la mubelenge.
S.TRANSL: 當他抓住那個樹枝時，然後他坐了上去
When he grasp the branch, then he sits on that

S.FORM: la katuase si.
S.TRANSL: 然後(那樹枝)離開了
then (the branch) left

S.FORM: alaka thadi kudra bulabulai ka salaunguane.
S.TRANSL: 那野獸原來是母鹿
The beast turns out to be a female deer

S.FORM: kai thiathiale sa dreele nga alaka salaunguane.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩看到時，不知道是什麼。原來是鹿
When (the boy) saw it, he does not know (what it is). It turns out to be a deer.

S.FORM: la kayngalay ku taupungu si alealeale nga.
S.TRANSL: 然後，狗來了，一直叫。
Then, the dog comes and it is barking.

S.FORM: kaynganay kela kuini ki lregelrege la katuatuase kela kuini ki kalrevelrevesane.
S.TRANSL: (狗) 來這座山，然後前往懸崖。
(the dog) comes to the mountain and then leave for the cliff.

S.FORM: la tuaverevere kuini vavalake si taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 然後小孩和狗掉落
Then the child and dog falls down.

S.FORM: sa tuaverevere kudra makakai aciacilay.
S.TRANSL: 當他們掉入水裏
When (they) fall into the water.

S.FORM: kuini cucubunge yakay kudra angatu.
S.TRANSL: 前面有一棵樹。
There is a tree ahead.

S.FORM: la mua nga dreele kuini ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 他們靠近去看那棵樹。
Then (they) go take a look at the tree.

S.FORM: sa kela nga kuini ki angatu yaiye.
S.TRANSL: 當他們靠近那棵樹。
When they come to the tree.

S.FORM: la kialalra ku mararariau ku yadringi ki angatu ka barungulu.
S.TRANSL: 然後(男孩)聽到樹洞裏出來的聲音
Then (the boy) hear sounds from the inside of the hole in the tree

S.FORM: icelecelebea la yakay taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 安靜! 有青蛙。
Silence! There are frogs.

S.FORM: la ikay kuini dredreelre.
dreele alaka muabere ku takurauru ini.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)看那些青蛙。(那些青蛙)原來是他的青蛙。
(the boy) looks at it. (The frogs are) indeed his frogs.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la malra aku ku vaeva kutumane la ibelenge.
S.TRANSL: 拿了一隻(青蛙) 其它的就在上面
(The boy) takes one (frog) and leave the others on the trunk.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: la kirarakay mailuku kuini takurauru kavaeva katuase mutavanane.
S.TRANSL: (那小孩)覺得很開心，(他)帶了一隻青蛙回家。
Then (the boy) is happ and (he) brings one frog with him and go back home.
